name: @torkbot/sandbox
description: A TypeScript-first Node.js library for spawning libkrun-backed microVMs.

scripts.build: npm run build:host && npm run build:ts
scripts.build:ts: rm -f dist/*.js dist/*.js.map dist/*.d.ts dist/*.d.ts.map && tsgo --project tsconfig.build.json --pretty
scripts.release:prepare: node --run build && node --run build:init && node --run build:rootfs && node --run build:rootfs:qcow2 && node ./scripts/prepare-npm-packages.ts --clean --root && node ./scripts/prepare-npm-packages.ts --platform --current
scripts.release:pack: npm run build:ts && node --run build:init && node --run build:rootfs && node --run build:rootfs:qcow2 && node ./scripts/prepare-npm-packages.ts --clean --root && node ./scripts/prepare-npm-packages.ts --platform --current && npm pack --dry-run ./dist/npm/sandbox && npm pack --dry-run ./dist/npm/sandbox-*
